tagline: Compact R290 portable dehumidifier for grow rooms and small greenhouses.
sellingPoints: The GROW-60 is an eco-friendly R290A portable dehumidifier that delivers 60L/day at 30°C 80%RH. With a 6.5L water tank and built-in wheels, it offers true portability for small grow rooms and propagation chambers. Supports customizable colors for OEM/ODM orders.

tagline: High-capacity portable dehumidifier for medium greenhouses and cultivation rooms.
sellingPoints: The GROW-90 offers industrial-level 90L/day capacity in a portable form factor. Continuous water pipe drainage means zero manual emptying, ideal for unattended greenhouse operations. The high 1000m³/h airflow ensures rapid humidity normalization after watering cycles.

tagline: Maximum-capacity portable unit for large growing facilities.
sellingPoints: The GROW-120 is our most powerful portable dehumidifier at 120L/day, handling the moisture load of large-scale growing operations. With 1300m³/h airflow and continuous drainage, it provides uninterrupted, high-volume dehumidification without manual intervention.

tagline: High-capacity floor-standing dehumidifier for large-scale commercial growing operations.
sellingPoints: The GRO-165L floor-standing dehumidifier removes 165L of moisture per day and is built for demanding commercial greenhouse operations. Integrated Modbus/RS485 communication enables full BMS integration for automated, multi-unit climate control systems.

tagline: 3-phase industrial dehumidifier for warehouse-scale growing facilities.
sellingPoints: The GRO-288L handles the moisture demands of warehouse-scale operations with 288L/day capacity and 3000m³/h airflow. 3-phase power supply ensures stable, energy-efficient operation for large industrial growing facilities. Fully Modbus-compatible for centralized climate management.

tagline: Industrial-grade dehumidifier for the most demanding large-scale growing environments.
sellingPoints: The GRO-385L is engineered for industrial-grade moisture control at massive scale — 385L/day with 5000m³/h airflow. Designed for mega-greenhouses and high-throughput vertical farms, it integrates seamlessly with building automation via Modbus/RS485.

tagline: 3-phase floor-standing dehumidifier for medium-to-large commercial greenhouse operations.
sellingPoints: The GRO-168L(3P) offers 168L/day capacity with 3-phase efficiency — bridging the gap between single-phase portables and heavy industrial units. Ideal for medium greenhouses upgrading from portable to permanent floor-standing systems.

tagline: Heavy-duty industrial floor-standing dehumidifier for mega-greenhouse complexes.
sellingPoints: The GRO-720L delivers massive 720L/day capacity with 7400m³/h airflow — engineered for mega-greenhouses and large-scale food processing facilities. Modbus integration enables seamless BMS connectivity for automated multi-unit climate orchestration.

tagline: Maximum-capacity floor-standing dehumidifier for the largest industrial growing facilities.
sellingPoints: The GRO-960L is our most powerful floor-standing dehumidifier — 960L/day with 10000m³/h airflow for unmatched moisture control at industrial scale. Built for the world's largest greenhouse complexes and drying facilities requiring absolute reliability 24/7/365.

tagline: Compact ceiling-mount dehumidifier for small growing areas and propagation zones.
sellingPoints: The GD-28L is our most compact ceiling dehumidifier — just 211mm thick for concealed installation in low-ceiling spaces. Perfect for tissue culture labs and small propagation zones where floor space is at a premium and discretion matters.

tagline: Mid-range ceiling dehumidifier for commercial greenhouses and grow rooms.
sellingPoints: The GD-90L provides commercial-grade 90L/day dehumidification with ceiling or duct installation. With 1000m³/h airflow and Modbus communication, it integrates into professional greenhouse automation systems while keeping the growing floor completely unobstructed.

tagline: High-capacity ducted dehumidifier for large commercial growing facilities.
sellingPoints: The GD-160L delivers 160L/day via concealed duct installation, making it ideal for facilities where aesthetics and floor space utilization are critical. 3-phase power ensures energy-efficient operation; full Modbus integration suits automated multi-zone climate systems.

tagline: Industrial ceiling dehumidifier for high-humidity large-scale growing environments.
sellingPoints: The GD-240L handles the moisture load of large commercial complexes with 240L/day capacity and 3000m³/h airflow — all from a concealed ceiling installation. OEM configurations available for private-label projects.

tagline: Heavy-duty ceiling dehumidifier for industrial-scale growing operations.
sellingPoints: The GD-480L is our flagship ceiling dehumidifier, removing 480L of moisture per day via concealed overhead installation. At 5600m³/h airflow, it rapidly restores target humidity levels in the largest growing environments — essential for high-value crop facilities with strict climate requirements.

tagline: Maximum-capacity ceiling dehumidifier for the largest greenhouse complexes.
sellingPoints: The GD-720L represents the pinnacle of our ceiling dehumidifier series — 720L/day and 7400m³/h airflow for the most demanding large-scale greenhouse complexes. Engineered for 24/7 operation in high-humidity tropical growing environments and multi-zone automated facilities.

tagline: Entry-level desiccant dehumidifier for seed storage and cold environment applications.
sellingPoints: The GROW-320 is our most accessible desiccant dehumidifier — compact, 220V single-phase, and only 32kg. Unlike compressor units, it operates effectively in cold environments down to -10°C, making it ideal for seed banks and refrigerated storage rooms.

tagline: Mid-capacity desiccant unit for larger seed vaults and cold storage facilities.
sellingPoints: The GROW-580 scales up desiccant performance to 580m³/h while remaining 220V single-phase. Achieves and sustains humidity levels below 30% RH — critical for long-term seed viability and moisture-sensitive pharmaceutical storage.

tagline: Industrial desiccant dehumidifier for large-scale low-humidity environments.
sellingPoints: The GROW-750M brings industrial-grade desiccant performance with 750m³/h capacity and 3-phase power. With external static pressure of 120Pa, it supports integrated duct systems for multi-room low-humidity climate control.

tagline: High-capacity desiccant dehumidifier for industrial-scale ultra-dry environments.
sellingPoints: The GROW-1100M delivers 1100m³/h desiccant dehumidification for large industrial facilities requiring ultra-low humidity conditions year-round. At 150Pa external static pressure, it drives conditioned air through extensive duct networks across multiple zones.

tagline: Premium industrial desiccant unit for the most demanding climate control projects.
sellingPoints: The GROW-1550M is engineered for projects where failure is not an option — 1550m³/h process airflow at 200Pa ensures reliable ultra-low humidity control across large multi-zone facilities. The automatic desiccant regeneration system minimizes maintenance intervention.
